column11: Message
enquiry.visitor.activated
room.pci-disclaimer
Hi
room.join
When can i expect my singapore virtual number? Its been 2-3 days i am still waiting
one moment please

ok waiting
thanks

Please to check your email or your CINNOX Dashboard.
The business verification is done (passed), and you should be able to proceed with paying the SG number.

Our another colleague is checking the status of your number.  One moment please.
How i will be able to see my sms ?
Becasue i am not getting sms
Let me check.
The Singapore number should only support voice but not support SMS.
but when i was buying there was written send call recv call send message recv message

confirmed by our colleagues, the Singapore number only support voice.
Even the whatsapp is not working
I need a refund and cancel my account
